# gh-aw-fleet

> Declarative fleet manager for GitHub Agentic Workflows.

- [Home](https://rshade.github.io/gh-aw-fleet/)
- [Install](https://rshade.github.io/gh-aw-fleet/install/)
- [Configuration](https://rshade.github.io/gh-aw-fleet/configuration/)
- [Reconcile Workflow](https://rshade.github.io/gh-aw-fleet/reconcile/)
- [Consumption and FinOps](https://rshade.github.io/gh-aw-fleet/consumption/)
- [Roadmap](https://rshade.github.io/gh-aw-fleet/roadmap/)
